message:
perf(mux): optimize encoder with GPU VPP scaling and fix QP mismatch

- Move BGRX surface to source resolution so VPP does downscaling on GPU,
  eliminating the CPU box-filter loop (~87ms → GPU-accelerated)
- CPU now only does R↔B byte swap (no downscaling), much faster
- Fix PPS/encoder QP mismatch: PPS was declaring pic_init_qp=26 while
  encoder used 20, causing blue/corrupt frames at lower QP values
- Lower effective QP to 16 via slice_qp_delta=-4 for reduced H.264
  ringing artifacts around high-contrast text edges
- Increase deblocking filter strength (alpha=3, beta=3) for cleaner edges
- Increase coded buffer from 4MB to 16MB for low-QP keyframes
